verses.translation: By the dawn
And [by] ten nights
And [by] the even [number] and the odd
And [by] the night when it passes

verses.text: هَلۡ فِي ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٞ لِّذِي حِجۡرٍ
verses.translit: Hal fee thalika qasamun lithee hijrin
verses.translation: Is there [not] in [all] that an oath [sufficient] for one of perception

verses.text: أَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
verses.translit: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka biAAadin
verses.translation: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with 'Aad
[With] Iram - who had lofty pillars

verses.text: ٱلَّتِي لَمۡ يُخۡلَقۡ مِثۡلُهَا فِي ٱلۡبِلَٰدِ
verses.translit: Allatee lam yukhlaq mithluha fee albiladi
verses.translation: The likes of whom had never been created in the land
And [with] Thamud, who carved out the rocks in the valley
And [with] Pharaoh, owner of the stakes
[All of] whom oppressed within the lands
And increased therein the corruption
So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment
Indeed, your Lord is in observation

verses.text: فَأَمَّا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبۡتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكۡرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّيٓ أَكۡرَمَنِ
verses.translit: Faamma alinsanu itha ma ibtalahu rabbuhu faakramahu wanaAAAAamahu fayaqoolu rabbee akramani
verses.translation: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me

verses.text: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبۡتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيۡهِ رِزۡقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّيٓ أَهَٰنَنِ
verses.translit: Waamma itha ma ibtalahu faqadara AAalayhi rizqahu fayaqoolu rabbee ahanani
verses.translation: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me
No! But you do not honor the orphan
And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor
And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether
And you love wealth with immense love

verses.text: كَلَّآۖ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ دَكّٗا دَكّٗا
verses.translit: Kalla itha dukkati alardu dakkan dakkan
verses.translation: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed
And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank

verses.text: وَجِاْيٓءَ يَوۡمَئِذِۭ بِجَهَنَّمَۚ يَوۡمَئِذٖ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكۡرَىٰ
verses.translit: Wajeea yawmaithin bijahannama yawmaithin yatathakkaru alinsanu waanna lahu alththikra
verses.translation: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance
He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life
So on that Day, none will punish [as severely] as His punishment
And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers]
[To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul
Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him]
And enter among My [righteous] servants
And enter My Paradise
